revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:CJKV/doc]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:CJKV/doc]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6737452)
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CJKV%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} ==Usage== To use the template, start with {{tlc|CJKV}} and add any parameters you like, along with what you want to be displayed. The template will display all and only, the parameters that you give it. The following parameters are supported: ;Parameters {|class="wikitable" |- ! Parameter !! Description !! Example |- | {{para|t}} || [[:en:Traditional Chinese characters|traditional Chinese]] || {{tlx|CJKV|t{{=}}李四}}
{{CJKV|t=李四}} |- | {{para|s}} || [[:en:Simplified Chinese characters|simplified Chinese]] || {{tlx|CJKV|s{{=}}李四}}
{{CJKV|s=李四}} |- | {{para|c}} || [[:en:Chinese language|Chinese]] || {{tlx|CJKV|c{{=}}李四}}
{{CJKV|c=李四}} |- | {{para|p}} || [[:en:Pinyin|Hanyu Pinyin]] || {{tlx|CJKV|p{{=}}Zhōnghuá Mínguó}}
{{CJKV|p=Zhōnghuá Mínguó}} |- | {{para|tp}} || [[:en:Tongyong Pinyin|Tongyong Pinyin]] || {{tlx|CJKV|tp{{=}}Jhonghuá Mínguó}}
{{CJKV|tp=Jhonghuá Mínguó}} |- | {{para|cy}} || [[:en:Cantonese Yale|Cantonese Yale]] || {{tlx|CJKV|cy{{=}}lei5 sei3}}
{{CJKV|cy=lei5 sei3}} |- | {{para|cj}} || [[:en:Jyutping|Cantonese Jyutping]] || {{tlx|CJKV|cj{{=}}lei5 sei3}}
{{CJKV|cj=lei5 sei3}} |- | {{para|w}} || [[:en:Wade–Giles|Wade–Giles]] || {{tlx|CJKV|w{{=}}Chung-hua Min-kuo}}
{{CJKV|w=Chung-hua Min-kuo}} |- | {{para|j}} || [[:en:Japanese language|Japanese]] || {{tlx|CJKV|j{{=}}中華人民共和国}}
{{CJKV|j=中華人民共和国}} |- | {{para|r}} || [[:en:Romanization of Japanese|Rōmaji]] || {{tlx|CJKV|r{{=}}Chūka jinmin kyōwa-koku}}
{{CJKV|r=Chūka jinmin kyōwa-koku}} |- | {{para|k}} || [[:en:Korean language|Korean]] || {{tlx|CJKV|k{{=}}중화 인민 공화국}}
{{CJKV|k=중화 인민 공화국}} |- | {{para|rr}} || [[Romanization of Korean|Romaja]] || {{tlx|CJKV|rr{{=}}Junghwa inmin gonghwaguk}}
{{CJKV|rr=Junghwa inmin gonghwaguk}} |- | {{para|v}} || [[:en:Vietnamese language|Vietnamese]] || {{tlx|CJKV|v{{=}}Trung Quốc}}
{{CJKV|v=Trung Quốc}} |- | {{para|l}} || [[:en:en:Literal translation|en:Literal translation]] || {{tlx|CJKV|l{{=}}China}}
{{CJKV|l=China}} |- |} ''(Note: "Japanese pronunciation" or "Korean pronunciation" will appear, instead of "rōmaji" or "romaja", if their Japanese and Korean parameters are missing respectively. See examples 6 and 7.)'' All parameters are optional. ==Examples== Traditional Chinese always goes first. # {{CJKV|t=張三|s=张三}}
{{CJKV|t=張三|s=张三}} # {{CJKV|s=张三|t=張三}}
{{CJKV|s=张三|t=張三}} This template compares traditional Chinese, simplified Chinese and Japanese Kanji automatically. # {{CJKV|t=李四}}
{{CJKV|t=李四}} # {{CJKV|s=李四}}
{{CJKV|s=李四}} # {{CJKV|t=李四|s=李四}}
{{CJKV|t=李四|s=李四}} # {{CJKV|t=李四|s=李四|j=李四}}
{{CJKV|t=李四|s=李四|j=李四}} # {{CJKV|t=李四|s=李四|j=李四|k=이사}}
{{CJKV|t=李四|s=李四|j=李四|k=이사}} # {{CJKV|t=李四|s=李四|j=李四|k=이사|l=foobar}}
{{CJKV|t=李四|s=李四|j=李四|k=이사|l=foobar}} Simplified and traditional Chinese can be combined together. # {{CJKV|t=皇居|s=皇居|j=皇居|k=고쿄}}
{{CJKV|t=皇居|s=皇居|j=皇居|k=고쿄}} # {{CJKV|c=皇居|j=皇居|k=고쿄}}
{{CJKV|c=皇居|j=皇居|k=고쿄}} # {{CJKV|c=皇居|j=皇居|k=고쿄|l=Imperial Residence}}
{{CJKV|c=皇居|j=皇居|k=고쿄|l=Imperial Residence}} Note that the combined Chinese parameter will overwrite existing ones. # {{CJKV|t=黃飛鴻|s=黄飞鸿|c=黄飞鸿|j=黄飛鴻|k=황비홍}}
{{CJKV|t=黃飛鴻|s=黄飞鸿|c=黄飞鸿|j=黄飛鴻|k=황비홍}}
is equivalent to # {{CJKV|c=黄飞鸿|j=黄飛鴻|k=황비홍}}
{{CJKV|c=黄飞鸿|j=黄飛鴻|k=황비홍}} More examples: # {{CJKV|t=中國|s=中国|j=中國|k=중국}}
{{CJKV|t=中國|s=中国|j=中國|k=중국}} # {{CJKV|t=中國|s=中国|j=中国|k=중국}}
{{CJKV|t=中國|s=中国|j=中国|k=중국}} # {{CJKV|c=立春|j=立春|k=입춘|v=Lập xuân|l=establishment of spring}}
{{CJKV|c=立春|j=立春|k=입춘|v=Lập xuân|l=establishment of spring}} # {{CJKV|t=漢族|s=汉族|p=hànzú|j=漢民族|r=kan minzoku|k=한족}}
{{CJKV|t=漢族|s=汉族|p=hànzú|j=漢民族|r=kan minzoku|k=한족}} # {{CJKV|t=中華民國|s=中华民国|p=Zhōnghuá Mínguó|tp=Jhonghuá Mínguó|w=Chung-hua Min-kuo}}
{{CJKV|t=中華民國|s=中华民国|p=Zhōnghuá Mínguó|tp=Jhonghuá Mínguó|w=Chung-hua Min-kuo}} # '''Emperor''' ({{CJKV|c=皇帝|p=Huángdì|r=Kōtei|rr=Hwangje|v=Hoàng đế}})
'''Emperor''' ({{CJKV|c=皇帝|p=Huángdì|r=Kōtei|rr=Hwangje|v=Hoàng đế}}) # '''History of China''' ({{CJKV|t=中國歷史|s=中国历史|p=Zhōngguó lìshǐ|j=中国の歴史|r=Chūgoku no rekishi|k=중국의 역사|rr=Junggugui Yeoksa|v=Lịch sử Trung Quốc}})
'''History of China''' ({{CJKV|t=中國歷史|s=中国历史|p=Zhōngguó lìshǐ|j=中国の歴史|r=Chūgoku no rekishi|k=중국의 역사|rr=Junggugui Yeoksa|v=Lịch sử Trung Quốc}}) ==See also== *{{tlx|Infobox Chinese}} – infobox template supports traditional, simplified Chinese as well as other common romanizations. ===Similar templates=== {{CJKV/All inline language templates}} {{Unicode templates}} ==TemplateData== {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}} { "description": "A template to facilitate consistent layout, proper formatting, categorisation and language labelling of Chinese text and its romanizations", "params": { "c": { "label": "Chinese", "description": "Chinese characters", "type": "line", "suggested": true, "example": "李四" }, "s": { "label": "Simplified Chinese", "description": "Simplified Chinese characters", "type": "line", "suggested": true, "example": "中国" }, "t": { "label": "Traditional Chinese", "description": "Traditional Chinese characters", "type": "string", "suggested": true, "example": "中國" }, "p": { "label": "Pinyin", "description": "Hanyu Pinyin Romanization", "type": "string", "example": "Zhōnghuá Mínguó", "suggested": true }, "tp": { "label": "Tongyong Pinyin", "description": "Tongyong Pinyin Romanization", "type": "string", "example": "Jhonghuá Mínguó" }, "cj": { "label": "Cantonese Jyutping", "description": "Cantonese Jyutping Romanization", "type": "string" }, "cy": { "label": "Cantonese Yale", "description": "Cantonese Yale Romanization", "type": "line" }, "w": { "label": "Wade-Giles", "description": "Wade-Giles Romanization", "type": "line" }, "j": { "label": "Japanese", "description": "Japanese kana/kanji text", "example": "中華民国", "type": "line" }, "r": { "label": "Rōmaji", "description": "Japanese Rōmaji", "example": "Chūka jinmin kyōwa-koku", "type": "string" }, "k": { "label": "Korean", "description": "Korean language text", "example": "중화 인민 공화국", "type": "string" }, "rr": { "label": "Romaja", "description": "Korean romanization (Revised Romanization)", "example": "Junghwa inmin gonghwaguk", "type": "string" }, "v": { "label": "Vietnamese", "description": "Vietnamese language text", "example": "Trung Quốc", "type": "string" }, "l": { "label": "literally", "description": "literal [English] meaning", "type": "line", "example": "Middle Country; China" } }, "format": "inline" } {{collapse bottom}} {{Sandbox other|| [[fr:Template:CJKV]] }} {{wikidata link|Q6737452}} [[Category:Chinese multilingual support templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Japanese multilingual support templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Korean multilingual support templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia multilingual support templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
